column1: # Cross-PAR residue comparison joined on GPCRdb generic_number.
# One row per generic-number position that appears in ≥1 PAR.
# AA_PARi: amino acid in PARi at that generic position. Blank = position has no contacts in PARi (or no annotation).
# signed_sum_PARi: active_minus_inactive (signed sum of ΔRRCS across contacts) for PARi.
# max_delta_PARi: max |ΔRRCS| at that residue in PARi.
# Sorted by max(|signed_sum_PAR*|) descending so cross-PAR hotspots float to the top.
